title: Hisuian Arcanine Battle Guide
summary: A bulky [Fire]/[Rock] physical attacker with [intimidate] — combines utility support with [rock-slide] spread flinches and signature [extreme-speed] priority.
weaknesses: Speed 90 is outsped by the top offensive tier
bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Hisuian Arcanine is a bulky physical attacker built around [intimidate] utility and dual [Fire]/[Rock] STAB. 115 Attack and 95 HP let it trade into opposing physical attackers, while [rock-slide] exploits doubles with spread damage and flinches. Its signature [extreme-speed] provides reliable +2 priority.

## Strengths
[intimidate] is one of the most impactful support abilities in doubles — cutting two attackers' damage at the same time. [rock-slide] threatens to flinch both opposing Pokemon per turn, creating tempo-winning moments. [flare-blitz] is the hardest-hitting [Fire] STAB at this Attack tier. [extreme-speed] handles priority races cleanly.

## Weaknesses & Answers
The [Rock] type introduces a 4x weakness to [Water] — [hydro-pump] or [surf] ends the set immediately. [Ground], [Fighting], and [Rock] are also live weaknesses. Speed 90 is too slow to outrun top threats, so Hisuian Arcanine leans on [intimidate] and priority to compensate.

## Recommended Moveset
[rock-slide] is the spread damage core. [flare-blitz] is the single-target STAB. [extreme-speed] is the priority finisher. [protect] is mandatory for doubles tempo.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[life-orb] is the default offensive item. [assault-vest] turns it into a special wall variant. [safety-goggles] counters spore spam. [intimidate] is locked. Tera [Fire] or [Rock] stacks STAB; Tera [Rock] also softens the [Water] 4x.

## Teammates & Synergy
Must have a [Water] counter — [Electric] or [Grass] partner is mandatory. [Fairy] and [Flying] cover the [Fighting] weakness. [tailwind] and [follow-me] extend the game plan.

## Play Patterns
Lead to trigger [intimidate], pressure with [rock-slide] for flinch tempo, and click [flare-blitz] for committed KOs. Save [extreme-speed] for revenge kills on faster frail threats. Switch out immediately against [Water] attackers.
